name: [AT] Placement-Ready
description: Notifies the team when a VA is placement-ready and later sends the VA a welcome email with resume, intro video, DISC, and match announcement requirements after their last day with the client.

assignments.name: scheduledTime
assignments.value: ={{ DateTime.fromISO($json.body["Last day with the client"]).plus({ days: 1 }).setZone('America/Chicago', { keepLocalTime: true }).set({ hour: 8, minute: 0, second: 0 }).toISO() }}

parameters.subject: Welcome to the Scale Virtually Placements Talent Pool
